# MuleSoft Hadoop (HDFS) Connector

> LLM-friendly index for the latest version (6.0) of Hadoop (HDFS) Connector documentation.
> See [Hadoop (HDFS) Connector llms-full.txt](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hdfs-connector/llms-full.txt) for all the Hadoop (HDFS) Connector documentation in one file.

## Content

- [Hadoop (HDFS) Connector - Examples](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hdfs-connector/latest/hdfs-connector-examples.md)
- [HDFS (Hadoop) Connector Reference](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hdfs-connector/latest/hdfs-connector-reference.md)
- [Using Anypoint Studio to Configure Hadoop (HDFS) Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hdfs-connector/latest/hdfs-connector-studio.md)
- [Hadoop (HDFS) Connector - XML and Maven Support](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hdfs-connector/latest/hdfs-connector-xml-maven.md)
- [Hadoop (HDFS) Connector](https://docs.mulesoft.com/hdfs-connector/latest/index.md)
